title: Task Status Bot
description: Developed a conversational AI assistant that enables teams to quickly retrieve task status, deadlines, and blockers without dependency on team member availability.
details: Designed and implemented a lightweight AI-powered chat interface that allows users to query task-related information using natural language. Integrated embedding-based retrieval with ChromaDB to understand context and provide accurate responses on task status, deadlines, and blockers. Built with a zero-database approach, enabling easy deployment and seamless sharing across teams without authentication overhead.
